reviews.review_title: devs made this and left… [UPDATED INFO]
reviews.review_description:
I liked playing this game but the people who are in the community of this game ￼￼either actually make good maps and cosmetics or use the cosmetic maker for inappropriate content

Really sad to see this game come into this

Last thing I wanna say they left this game to rot, I think there’s gonna be no updates at all ￼￼

Also, they added a limit for building, which is kind of dumb 

So if you’re going to play the game report people who have inappropriate outfits and know that they won’t give any updates 

Last thing… the buttons are ridiculously hard to press, you have to twist your hand everywhere just to click on the button
Making a map is hard but the game is really fun you should get the game and playing with your friends is super fun!

This game concept is fun and has a lot of potential. The game is low quality and the creative feature could be improved. This game hasn't reached its potential but if it does it could possibly be a 5 star game.

I mean its good. And it kinda made me famos for making popiler games but its so harde to make cosmetics and horror games

I
This game is so bad it lags you outnsoo much

This game is a buggy mess that needs to be updated. You guys have left this game behind for so long and I loved playing it. Now everytime I load into my world, you can't see cosmetics except the ones that you are wearing. If you stay at spawn for a couple seconds, the game will not let you join other worlds and will crash your game if you equip cosmetics. Also the player base is terrible and the game is dying, so there is no fixing this game except for an update. Fix your game.

reviews.review_title: Good but annoying bugs and haven’t gotte
reviews.review_description: So I’d love to play this game usually but it’s also very buggy and annoying thing to actually move something cause when I move something it doesn’t even move at all. It just teleports to a different size or and also there’s lots of other bugs that aren’t found out yet probably probably people who would try to even do anything without a bug, but the good part of this game is it’s kind of fun and you can build your own cosmetics and maps except they say and they’re such true true but seriously update your game and here’s why I won’t end the update a teleporting system. It would be like a block that moves you somewhere else in a split second and animating system so basically how this would work is if you have something grouped, it would ungroup until you fully anime all the pieces in that group thing and if it’s just one thing that isn’t a group you can still animate it and it ￼does be kind of cool a water system so basically it would just be where you could swim the ability to place to spawns so basically when you place two spawns that would be a section on the editor that would let you set a chance for the spawn and it would go all the way down to 0.001 another cool idea ideas countdowns you already know how this works and that’s all

I love this game so much and it has so much potential. There are yes some bugs and they will most likely get fixed but I just wanna ask if you could make it where you can delete cosmetics from your inventory thing. And also if we make a second world can you  add a feature where we can add a cosmetic stand and adds cosmetic from one of our previous worlds or from our inventory? That’s all I have to say and don’t give up on this game ever! I love the concept and it’s already so good! Just a few suggestions from me.
